title: Grade and pack eggs for human consumption
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Grade and pack eggs for human consumption demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks for grading and packing eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks for grading and packing eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks for grading and packing eggs.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for grading and packing eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for grading and packing eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for grading and packing eggs.

pcs.text: Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation.

pcs.text: Ensure sufficient supply of packing consumables
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure sufficient supply of packing consumables?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure sufficient supply of packing consumables.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Grade eggs and prepare for packing

pcs.text: Load eggs onto grader according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load eggs onto grader according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load eggs onto grader according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Control flow of eggs to match grader flow rate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Control flow of eggs to match grader flow rate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Control flow of eggs to match grader flow rate.

pcs.text: Remove very dirty, cracked and leaking eggs manually or mechanically
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove very dirty, cracked and leaking eggs manually or mechanically?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove very dirty, cracked and leaking eggs manually or mechanically.

pcs.text: Candle eggs and remove eggs with faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Candle eggs and remove eggs with faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Candle eggs and remove eggs with faults.

pcs.text: Grade eggs intended for human consumption according to weight and quality categories
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Grade eggs intended for human consumption according to weight and quality categories?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Grade eggs intended for human consumption according to weight and quality categories.

pcs.text: Wash eggs, if required, using approved sanitisers and equipment according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Wash eggs, if required, using approved sanitisers and equipment according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wash eggs, if required, using approved sanitisers and equipment according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Oil washed eggs according to food safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Oil washed eggs according to food safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Oil washed eggs according to food safety requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure eggs are stamped according to food safety and enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure eggs are stamped according to food safety and enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure eggs are stamped according to food safety and enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Take and prepare egg or swab samples for testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take and prepare egg or swab samples for testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take and prepare egg or swab samples for testing.

pcs.text: Ensure correct separation of non-conforming products and saleable products according to food safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure correct separation of non-conforming products and saleable products according to food safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure correct separation of non-conforming products and saleable products according to food safety requirements.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues promptly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Grade eggs and prepare for packing

elements.title: Pack and store eggs

pcs.text: Pack eggs with pointed end down into cartons or trays and/or boxes according to customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pack eggs with pointed end down into cartons or trays and/or boxes according to customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pack eggs with pointed end down into cartons or trays and/or boxes according to customer requirements.

pcs.text: Load trays or boxes onto pallets and wrap pallets to secure trays or boxes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load trays or boxes onto pallets and wrap pallets to secure trays or boxes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load trays or boxes onto pallets and wrap pallets to secure trays or boxes.

pcs.text: Ensure trays, cartons, boxes and pallets are labelled correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure trays, cartons, boxes and pallets are labelled correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure trays, cartons, boxes and pallets are labelled correctly.

pcs.text: Check cool room temperature and humidity, and adjust if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check cool room temperature and humidity, and adjust if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check cool room temperature and humidity, and adjust if required.

pcs.text: Transfer eggs to cool room
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer eggs to cool room?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer eggs to cool room.

pcs.text: Complete records accurately and report issues promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records accurately and report issues promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records accurately and report issues promptly.

pcs.text: Control pests in egg collection, packing and storage areas

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Control pests in egg collection, packing and storage areas.

pcs.text: Take swab samples of work and/or egg surfaces for testing if required

pcs.text: Process eggs not for retail sale according to enterprise requirements
